overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through an abandoned lot in Night City, crossing a street, and entering a commercial building. The scene features a bright desert-cyberpunk aesthetic with palm trees, futuristic architecture, and clear midday lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban lot with scattered debris and exercise equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through overgrown abandoned lot toward the city street ahead

entered.detail: abandoned outdoor gym structure painted bright yellow
fallen metal crowd control barriers on the ground
scattered trash and broken objects across the dirt ground
tall palm tree with green fronds
derelict concrete building with broken windows
elevated highway overpass in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an abandoned urban lot with overgrown grass and scattered debris. A yellow exercise structure stands in the center while metal barriers lie fallen nearby. The camera moves forward toward a distant overpass and the city street beyond, with palm trees and derelict buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm tree lining and construction site

events.description: transition from abandoned dirt lot onto paved street and concrete sidewalk
pedestrian crosses the sidewalk path in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: crosses the asphalt street and continues along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing red boots and backpack crossing the street
black car driving along the road in the background

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road with red curbs and yellow dividing lines
paved concrete pedestrian walkway
large building under construction with scaffolding and exposed framework
tall modern street lamp with orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the abandoned lot to a paved city street. The camera crosses the asphalt road and walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees. A pedestrian in distinctive red boots crosses the path, and vehicles drive by on the road. A large construction site dominates the left side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with central fountain and Night City building entrance

events.description: entering open paved plaza area with visible water fountain
approaching building entrance stairs and slowing pace

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward the Night City building entrance, passing by the fountain

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench conversing near the building entrance

entered.detail: large commercial building with teal and white facade and 'Night City' signage
circular water fountain with spray in the center of the plaza
large rectangular concrete planters with greenery
several parked vehicles along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide commercial plaza featuring a central water fountain and the prominent Night City building with its distinctive teal facade. The scene shifts from the tree-lined sidewalk to an open concrete plaza with parked cars and concrete planters. Two people sit on a bench near the entrance as the camera approaches the building stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: building security lobby with reception desk and waiting area

events.description: entering building through automatic sliding glass doors
turning right to face and approach the security desk area

agents.ego_description: entering the lobby through automatic doors and approaching the security checkpoint to observe the guard

notable_agents.action: security guard seated at desk monitoring multiple computer screens

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with metal frames
large curved reception desk with computer monitors
blue and orange snack vending machine with illuminated display
stack of cardboard boxes near the wall
white metal locker cabinets against the wall
empty wheelchair near the reception area

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the building through automatic glass doors into a dimly lit security lobby. The space features a tiled floor, a security desk with a guard monitoring screens, and various lobby elements like a vending machine and lockers. The camera turns toward the security desk, revealing the interior layout including a wheelchair and reception counter in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a derelict urban wasteland into the sterile interior of a corporate building. It begins in an abandoned lot filled with overgrown grass and scattered debris, moving past a yellow exercise structure toward a distant overpass. As the camera leaves the lot, the environment shifts to a paved city street where the view opens up to palm trees, passing traffic, and a large construction site. The scene then expands into a wide commercial plaza featuring a central water fountain and a prominent teal-facaded building, passing by parked cars and pedestrians on a concrete walkway. Finally, the camera transitions from the bright midday light of the plaza through automatic glass doors into a dimly lit security lobby, turning toward a guard at a reception desk.
